Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Archstone]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — The crystal ball obtained from the storehouse is called an Archstone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — The Archstone is an option left for Jai Daishou.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — The Archstone is an artifact that can draw madra from people in a room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — The Archstone can make the world appear gray and lifeless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — The Archstone is capable of siphoning much power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — The Archstone is related to a crystal ball.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — The Archstone is a Lord treasure found within the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — The Archstone was retrieved from a western labyrinth by Jai Daishou.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — The Archstone is a potent weapon stolen from an ancient, cursed labyrinth and confiscated from a traitor to the Empire's leadership.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — The Archstone is kept in the Emperor's personal vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Eithan produced a smoky orb known as the Archstone.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — The Archstone is used to reinforce Lindon's arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon absorbed the power of the Archstone when he advanced to Underlord.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The binding in Lindon's arm was altered by the addition of the Archstone.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
